alkylation reagent: alkylated with 11 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min with no light.
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 11 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min with no light.
cleavage agent: MaxQuant performed the search trypsin digestion with up to two missed cleavages.
instrument: connected to an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
reduction reagent: gel slice was reduced with 5 mM DTT for 30 min at 56 °C
reduction concentration: gel slice was reduced with 5 mM DTT for 30 min at 56 °C
